title: mesembryanthemum neglectum
intro: Mesembryanthemum neglectum, also known as ice plant, is a succulent plant species native to the Mediterranean region and South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Mesembryanthemum neglectum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing relief from coughs and colds. The herbal preparations of Mesembryanthemum neglectum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and topical creams for various health applications.
